title: Apply for PA3: Woodland management plan
body: "  PA3: Woodland management plan grant 2025 is closed for applications.  You can apply for other capital grants at any time of the year.   The PA3: Woodland management plan grant 2025 guidance consists of:   applicant’s guide agreement holder’s guide terms and conditions    Read the agreement holder’s guide to find out how to manage your agreement and make a claim for payment.   Contact Rural Payments Agency (RPA)  You can contact RPA by email, phone or post.   Rural Payments Agency  PO Box 324 Worksop S95 1DF  Email: ruralpayments@defra.gov.uk  Telephone: 03000 200 301 Monday to Friday, 8:30am to 5pm, except bank holidays Find out about call charges   "
